MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
